task_description: Build the Threat Intelligence Engine for ThreatOne Enterprise Desktop - Phase 6. Create src/threat_intel/ module with IOC Manager, Threat Feed Manager, Feed Parsers, MITRE ATT&CK Integration, CVE Database, Threat Correlation Engine, IOC Matching Engine, Threat Scoring, Intel Report Generator, and Enrichment Service. Integrate with SecurityEngine and add comprehensive unit tests.

verification.summary: Full build succeeds. All 380 tests pass (including 10 new threat_intel test files). Tests exercise real logic including IOC CRUD with thread safety, all 4 feed parsers with valid/invalid input, MITRE technique lookup, CVE search, IOC matching (exact/domain/IP/URL), scoring with age decay and correlation boost, report generation, and enrichment service.
